signals.npcLine: Crypto tides fall; trust erodes beneath neon haze.
signals.questPulse: Market shadows deepen, risking all credit and data.
signals.worldFeed: Global coinage bleeds value; keep your creds guarded.
signals.clueEvent: Sudden liquidity drains across alt chains detected.

signals.npcLine: Mega and Ultima chains flicker erratically. Stay alert.
signals.questPulse: Data sniffers pick spikes in MEGA token chatter.
signals.worldFeed: Ultima nodes report anomalous transaction surges.
signals.clueEvent: Unusual transaction bursts traced to ULTIMA sector.

signals.npcLine: Fear index rising; watch for panic signs in crowd.
signals.questPulse: Sentiment drops hard. A market panic may loom.
signals.worldFeed: Public mood sours as crypto values slide sharply.
signals.clueEvent: Spike in fear chatter detected on underground forums.

signals.npcLine: AI tokens gain whispers, promising hidden algorithm hacks.
signals.questPulse: Rumors swirl around AI coin’s secret data breach.
signals.worldFeed: Speculation grows on AI-based market moves soon.
signals.clueEvent: Encrypted leaks hint at AI coin impending drop.

signals.npcLine: USDM currency remains stable but eyes flicker with doubt.
signals.questPulse: Steady valuations mask shifting alliances and backdoor deals.
signals.worldFeed: Silent handlers shuffle USDM chips behind the scene.
signals.clueEvent: Whisper networks hint at hidden moves in USDM vault.
